title: Youmind 19399 Youmind 19399
prompt: A vintage, technical scientific diagram of [{argument name="subject" default="A GIANT STRAWBERRY SHORTCAKE"}], styled as a {argument name="style" default="1920s laboratory blueprint"}. The central dessert is highly detailed with scientific callouts using pseudo-intellectual terms like 'Aerated Dairy Matrix' or 'Granulated Sucrose Dusting.' The image features several data visualizations: a 'Moisture Absorbency Graph,' a 'Flavor Profile Hexagon,' and a 'Texture Hardness Scale' similar to the Mohs scale. The background is aged, tea-stained parchment with ornate Victorian borders, technical sketches of beakers and thermometers, and a 'Registered No. 1923' stamp at the bottom. Aesthetic: Retro-futurism, Da Vinci sketch meets old-school soda shop menu.
